title: Public GitHub Visibility Change Report

advisory_paperclip_path_label.observation: /paperclip/grantlayer-mvp appears as a checklist item in docs/public_snapshot_post_publish_smoke_review.md (absence check, not actual path exposure). Not flagged by scanner. Internal repo path name disclosed as governance artifact reference.

visibility_change.note: Repository was already public. No visibility change action was required. Verified via git ls-remote https://github.com/discodone/grantlayer.git returning HEAD without authentication.

f003_status.note: F-003: 9 Python files visible in public snapshot surface (SDK and scripts). Backend excluded by design. F-003 is a future improvement — not a blocker for GL-176.

remaining_cautions: Repository is a Developer Preview — not production SaaS.
